title: Game designer / product-owner terminal — third role in the multi-agent loop
summary: Adds a third Claude terminal alongside dev (S093) and QA (S093–S094): the game-designer / product-owner agent. Owns feature planning, mechanic decisions, and the Game Design Document (GDD). Reads merged sprint PRs to keep the GDD in sync with what shipped; writes design proposals back into the backlog. **Seed shipped in S096**: docs/game-design/agent.md (role + file-ownership table + proposed-story ticket schema sketch) and docs/game-design/gdd.md (stub with section headers). Remaining stories include: (1) `backlog/proposed-stories/*.story-proposal.json` schema + validator + `npm run propose:new` scaffold helper; (2) `npm run propose:promote -- --into <sprint>` analogous to qa:promote; (3) `.claude/agents/game-designer.md` subagent definition; (4) dogfood sprint where all three agents run in parallel; (5) fill in GDD sections for Kaboom Crew with the design rationale captured today across SAMPLE_GAME_IDEAS.md + sprint summaries.
